<div align="center">

# Yashwant Das

**Senior QA Engineer &nbsp;·&nbsp; AI-Assisted Test Systems &nbsp;·&nbsp; OTT/Media &nbsp;·&nbsp; Fintech &nbsp;·&nbsp; E-commerce**

12+ years building resilient quality systems for Fortune 500 companies.<br>
Currently designing **explainable, zero-trust AI QA architectures** —<br>where deterministic validation meets LLM-assisted reasoning.

<br>

<br>

---

### `FOCUS` &nbsp; What I work on

| Area | Detail |
|---|---|
| **Agentic QA systems** | LLM-assisted reasoning, confidence scoring, deterministic heuristics, self-healing concepts |
| **Vision-based automation** | UI understanding from screenshots, multimodal test exploration, visual fallback strategies |
| **Explainable test repair** | Failure analysis pipelines, auditable decision artifacts, human-in-the-loop validation |
| **OTT/Media quality** | Playback validation, DRM compliance, cross-device certification |
| **CI/CD quality gates** | Classical automation integrated with AI-assisted validation signals |

<br>

---

---

### `PHILOSOPHY` &nbsp; How I think about quality

> **Zero-trust AI architecture** — Correctness enforced through deterministic guardrails, not probabilistic model outputs alone.

> **Explainability by design** — Auditable decision artifacts, confidence scoring, and human-in-the-loop validation at every step.

> **Production-grade thinking** — Explicit distinction between experimental AI capability and defensible, maintainable production systems.

> **Pragmatic innovation** — Bridging classical QE rigour with modern AI-assisted approaches, evaluated realistically for production readiness.

<br>

---

### `WRITING` &nbsp; Published on Medium

I write about AI-assisted QA, autonomous testing concepts, CI/CD strategy, and OTT quality engineering.
